blocks.content: Back corner. Not isolated, not obvious. That's what I told myself anyway.
A kid sat down across from me without asking. Just sat.

blocks.speaker: DeShawn
blocks.content: Cause he been looking for somebody over here for the last five minutes.
I looked up. Jonathan was mid-conversation at the center table — but his eyes were sweeping the room slow. They found me.
For a second we just looked at each other across the whole cafeteria.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan found you. What does Larry do?

options.label: Give him a nod. You see him.
Look back down. Not ready for that conversation.
